summary: Comprehensive testing of Jënd-Ak-Jaay marketplace completed successfully. App renaming from SenMarket to Jënd-Ak-Jaay verified across all components. Image upload flow working perfectly with GridFS integration. All core functionality operational with 100% backend success rate and excellent frontend performance.
passed_tests: API health check shows 'Jënd-Ak-Jaay API is running' - app name correctly updated
App name 'Jënd-Ak-Jaay' visible in navbar across all pages
Homepage loads with products and statistics (10 Produits, 4 Services, 8 Utilisateurs)
Admin login works with admin@senmarket.sn / SenMarket2024!
Image upload via POST /api/upload/image returns URL with /api/media/ prefix
Media retrieval GET /api/media/{id} returns image content (HTTP 200)
Product creation with uploaded image successful
Post product page /post-product accessible after login with upload zone
Post service page /post-service accessible after login with upload zone
Navigation between Products and Services pages working
User registration with new email addresses working
Brute force protection active after 5 failed attempts
Admin endpoints accessible for admin users
